name: Duration of Workers Comp Benefits Midvale

mainEntity.name: How long do workers comp benefits last in Midvale Utah?
mainEntity.text: How long do workers comp benefits last in Midvale Utah?

acceptedAnswer.text: Temporary benefits until MMI or 312 weeks max permanent lifelong if total disability.[10]

suggestedAnswer.text: Midvale claims pay TTD 66 2/3% wages cap $900+/week until recovery; PTD indefinite for unable to work. Partial caps at 312 weeks. Reopen if condition worsens within 6 years—monitor health report changes.[10]

description: Temporary benefits until MMI or 312 weeks max permanent lifelong if total disability.[10]
